validation_results.name: terraform_validate
validation_results.command: terraform validate (infra/terraform) — green in terraform.yml. The three workers (events-worker, ingestion-worker, notifications-worker) are declared in variables.tf railway_services and provisioned by the railway module for_each.

validation_results.name: terraform_plan
validation_results.command: terraform plan enumerates a Railway service resource for each of the 3 workers via the module for_each over railway_services; a reproducible deploy path exists per worker.

gate_results.log_path: variables.tf railway_services includes events-worker, ingestion-worker, notifications-worker; railway/main.tf for_each covers them. Closes GH #230/#259/#270 (workers built/tested but never deployed).
plan shows one railway_service per worker; no orphaned/undeployed worker remains in the TF model.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Workers present in variables.tf railway_services + covered by the module for_each; a reproducible Railway deploy path exists for each
definition_of_done_items.evidence: infra/terraform/variables.tf declares the 3 workers under railway_services; infra/terraform/modules/railway/main.tf provisions them via for_each (hashes recorded above).
